name: collapsible
description: Expandable section with controlled and uncontrolled modes, LayoutAnimation, and custom icon support.

props.name: title
props.description: Header text displayed in the pressable toggle row.

props.name: children
props.description: Content revealed when the collapsible is expanded.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Initial open state for uncontrolled usage.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state; when provided the component is fully controlled.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Callback fired when the header is pressed, receives the new open state.

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom element to replace the default chevron icon in the header.

props.name: testID
props.description: Test identifier forwarded to the header Pressable.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
// Uncontrolled, starts expanded
<Collapsible title="Advanced Settings" defaultOpen>
  <Toggle label="Enable debug mode" />
</Collapsible>

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Custom icon replacing the default chevron
<Collapsible title="FAQ" icon={<PlusIcon />}>
  <Text>Frequently asked question answer goes here.</Text>
</Collapsible>

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Multiple collapsibles stacked in a settings screen
<Stack gap="sm">
  <Collapsible title="Account settings"><AccountForm /></Collapsible>
  <Collapsible title="Notifications"><NotificationToggles /></Collapsible>
  <Collapsible title="Privacy"><PrivacyOptions /></Collapsible>
</Stack>
